Asian economies, heavily reliant on imported energy, are particularly vulnerable and are considering emergency responses.

articles.description: He blamed her for their inability to conceive children. The murder occurred after the victim’s altercation with her husband’s second wife

articles.title: Govt considering lottery system, delinking women’s quota from census, delimitation
articles.description: The government is considering  implementing the Nari Shakti Vandan Adhiniyam  before the 2027 Uttar Pradesh and Uttarakhand assembly elections

articles.title: The chocolate truth test: FSSAI’s new labels may expose how much of India’s chocolate is “imitation”
articles.description: FSSAI proposes bold front-of-pack warnings for “imitation chocolate”, aiming to separate cocoa-butter chocolate from cheaper vegetable-fat substitutes.

articles.title: Assam elections: Three MLAs among nine candidates announced in first AIUDF list
articles.description: Among the nine candidates named are a former Congress legislator and a minority students’ body president who was in Congress for three days
